Bouffalant

#0625 Bisharp #0627 Rufflet
  • Contents
  • Info
  • Base stats
  • Evolution chart
  • Pokédex entries
  • Moves learned
  • Sprites
  • Locations
  • Language

Bouffalant is a Normal type Pokémon introduced in Generation 5.

Bouffalant

Additional artwork

Pokédex data

National № 0626
Type Normal
Species Bash Buffalo Pokémon
Height 1.6 m (5′03″)
Weight 94.6 kg (208.6 lbs)
Abilities 1. Reckless
2. Sap Sipper
Soundproof (hidden ability)
Local № 0132 (Black/White)
0269 (Black 2/White 2)
0053 (The Isle of Armor)

Training

EV yield 2 Attack
Catch rate 45 (5.9% with PokéBall, full HP)
Base Friendship 50 (normal)
Base Exp. 172
Growth Rate Medium Fast

Breeding

Egg Groups Field
Gender 50% male, 50% female
Egg cycles 20 (4,884–5,140 steps)

Base stats

HP 95
300 394
Attack 110
202 350
Defense 95
175 317
Sp. Atk 40
76 196
Sp. Def 95
175 317
Speed 55
103 229
Total 490 Min Max

The ranges shown on the right are for a level 100 Pokémon. Maximum values are based on a beneficial nature, 252 EVs, 31 IVs; minimum values are based on a hindering nature, 0 EVs, 0 IVs.

Evolution chart

  • Bouffalant does not evolve.

Bouffalant changes

  • In Generations 5-7, Bouffalant has a base Friendship value of 70.

Pokédex entries

Black Their fluffy fur absorbs damage, even if they strike foes with a fierce headbutt.
White They charge wildly and headbutt everything. Their headbutts have enough destructive force to derail a train.
Black 2
White 2		 They are known to charge so wildly that if a train were to enter their territory, they would send it flying.
X
Omega Ruby		 They charge wildly and headbutt everything. Their headbutts have enough destructive force to derail a train.
Y
Alpha Sapphire		 Their fluffy fur absorbs damage, even if they strike foes with a fierce headbutt.
Sword These Pokémon can crush a car with no more than a headbutt. Bouffalant with more hair on their heads hold higher positions within the herd.
Shield These Pokémon live in herds of about 20 individuals. Bouffalant that betray the herd will lose the hair on their heads for some reason.

Moves learned by Bouffalant

Legends: Z-A Sword/Shield

Moves learnt by level up

Bouffalant does not learn any level up moves in Pokémon Legends: Z-A.

Moves learnt by TM

Bouffalant cannot be taught any TM moves in Pokémon Legends: Z-A.

Japanese バッフロン (Buffron)
German Bisofank
French Frison
Italian Bouffalant
Spanish Bouffalant

Name origin

bouffant
hair style
buffalo
a large ox
